entity: 2019-20 Los Angeles Lakers regular-season record 52-19 (LeBron's 1st LAL year, 1-seed in West, bubble NBA champions)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (52-19, 1st in West/Pacific). The 2019-20 season was suspended March 11 and resumed in the Orlando bubble July 30. LAL went 3-0 in the bubble seeding round and 16-5 in the bubble playoffs. Pairs with the existing finals_2020_lal_mia fixture.
